name: Audio Plan
description: Planning document for a single audio cue. Specifies what to sound and why, leaving sonic aesthetic details to the Style Guide. Planning is cheap—create Audio Plans for ALL worthy moments. Generation is selective based on priority and budget.

fields.name: section_ref
fields.description: Reference to the section this audio supports (e.g., 'act1/foreman-gate')

fields.name: purpose
fields.description: Why this audio helps: atmosphere (set mood), signpost (signal transition or choice), recall (memory anchor), clarify (make described thing tangible)

fields.name: purpose_rationale
fields.description: 1-2 sentences explaining why this audio helps the player here

fields.name: description
fields.description: What the audio sounds like (concrete sounds, not abstractions)

fields.name: emotional_target
fields.description: The feeling this cue should evoke (e.g., 'unease', 'relief', 'urgency')

properties.name: type
properties.description: fixed (plays once), loop (repeats seamlessly), variable (fades in/out based on context)

fields.name: layering
fields.description: How this cue relates to other audio

properties.name: ducks_others
properties.description: Whether this cue lowers volume of other layers

properties.name: exclusive_group
properties.description: If set, only one cue from this group plays at a time

fields.name: caption
fields.description: Optional player-safe caption (for accessibility or if displayed)

fields.name: transcript
fields.description: For voice cues: the spoken text. For other cues: description of sound for accessibility.

fields.name: reference_refs
fields.description: References to Reference Sheets for recurring sonic elements (leitmotifs, location ambients)

fields.name: accessibility_notes
fields.description: Accessibility concerns (volume spikes, trigger warnings, caption requirements)

states.name: Draft
states.description: Plan is being created by Audio Director

states.name: Ready
states.description: Plan is complete and ready for generation when budget allows

states.name: Rendered
states.description: Audio has been generated and linked

states.name: Deferred
states.description: Plan exists but generation deferred (plan-only release)
